description: Right-click context menu with keyboard navigation and shortcut bindings

attributes.name: data-open
attributes.description: Reflected when context menu is visible. Uses data-open because the host is not a native dialog/details — open would be semantically misleading.

structure.description: Element defining the right-click target area
Context menu with <li> items holding <button> actions

childAttributes.name: data-trigger
childAttributes.description: Element defining the right-click target area

childAttributes.name: data-shortcut
childAttributes.description: Keyboard shortcut to bind, e.g. 'meta+c'. Displayed as formatted hint.

events.name: context-menu:select
events.description: Fired when a menu item is selected
